title: Police Raids on Ukrainian Drone Maker Fuel Fears About Press Freedom
summary_full: The raids targeted a military contractor and its owner, who also co-owns a news outlet that recently exposed abuse of soldiers. Journalists said it was no coincidence.
summary_public: The raids targeted a military contractor and its owner, who also co-owns a news outlet that recently exposed abuse of soldiers. Journalists said it was no coincidence.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: Police Raids on Ukrainian Drone Maker Fuel Fears About Press Freedom
